native_subagent_discovery: spawn_agent, wait_agent, and close_agent are exposed, but current tool policy allows spawn_agent only when the user explicitly asks for sub-agents, delegation, or parallel agent work; $sp-plan itself is not treated as user authorization.
join_points: before final constitution and risk re-check
